events.name: Growth Marketing Summit Online 2026
events.tagline: A virtual deep-dive into email, social, and analytics-driven growth
events.description: Growth Marketing Summit Online 2026 is a one-day virtual conference for modern marketers, focusing on lifecycle email, paid and organic social, and performance analytics. Join B2B and SaaS experts for keynotes, case studies, and live Q&A sessions designed to help you build a measurable growth engine.

events.name: Growth Marketing Bootcamp: Experimentation Intensive
events.tagline: Half-day virtual bootcamp on rapid experimentation for growth teams
events.description: This half-day virtual bootcamp focuses on running high-velocity experiments across email, landing pages, and in-product messaging. Ideal for teams who want a hands-on format ahead of the main summit.

promo_codes.description: 25% off VIP and All-Access tickets for Growth Marketing Summit Online 2026.
Early-bird 20% discount on Standard, Premium, and VIP passes before April 1.
15% off team bundles for groups of 3 or more attendees.
Flat $10 off any Standard or Premium ticket.

faq_items.question: What is Growth Marketing Summit Online 2026?
faq_items.answer: Growth Marketing Summit Online 2026 is a one-day virtual conference for B2B and SaaS marketers. You’ll get live keynotes, tactical breakouts on email, social, and analytics, plus optional access to session recordings depending on your ticket type.

faq_items.question: What are the different ticket options?
faq_items.answer: We offer several options: (1) Standard Pass – live access only for a single attendee; (2) Standard + Recordings – live access plus 30 days of session recordings for one attendee; (3) VIP All-Access Pass – extended recordings plus VIP small-group Q&A; (4) Team of 3 and Team of 5 bundles – discounted pricing for small teams; and (5) Company Unlimited Pass – a single pass covering your whole company (up to 25 attendees).

faq_items.question: What is the refund policy?
faq_items.answer: Standard Pass, Standard + Recordings, Team of 3, and Team of 5 tickets are refundable up to 7 days before the main conference day (April 15, 2026). VIP All-Access and Company Unlimited Pass tickets are non-refundable but may be transferred to another attendee at any time. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 7–10 business days. Look for the “Refundable” label on the ticket cards in the pricing section for quick reference. For full details, see the Refund Policy page linked in the footer.

faq_items.question: Do all tickets include session recordings?
faq_items.answer: No. The Standard Pass includes live access only. Standard + Recordings, VIP All-Access, Team of 3, Team of 5, and Company Unlimited Pass tickets all include access to session recordings. The duration of access ranges from 30 days for Standard + Recordings and team passes, up to 12 months for VIP and Company Unlimited.

faq_items.question: What are the technical requirements to join the sessions?
faq_items.answer: You can join from any modern browser (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari) on desktop or mobile. We recommend a stable internet connection of at least 5 Mbps and using headphones for the best audio experience. No additional software installation is required.

faq_items.question: Is the event accessible to attendees with disabilities?
faq_items.answer: Yes. All live sessions will include automated captions, and recordings will include edited captions within 48 hours. If you require additional accommodations, such as sign language interpretation or extended Q&A via email, please contact us at least 10 days before the event using the form on the Accessibility page linked in the footer.

refund_policies.summary: Standard and Team tickets are refundable up to 7 days before the main conference day; VIP and Company passes are non-refundable but transferable.
refund_policies.detailed_text:
For Growth Marketing Summit Online 2026, Standard Pass, Standard + Recordings, Team of 3, and Team of 5 tickets are eligible for a full refund if requested at least 7 calendar days before the main conference day (April 15, 2026). After this date, no refunds are available, but you may still transfer your seat to another attendee.

VIP All-Access and Company Unlimited Pass tickets are non-refundable due to limited capacity in VIP roundtables and the inclusion of extended on-demand access. However, you may transfer these tickets to another individual within your organization at any time before the event starts.

All refund requests must be initiated via the contact form on the Refund Policy page. Approved refunds are processed to the original payment method within 7–10 business days.

refund_policies.summary: Bootcamp tickets are refundable up to 3 days before the bootcamp date.
refund_policies.detailed_text: For the Growth Marketing Bootcamp: Experimentation Intensive, all ticket types are refundable up to 3 days before the bootcamp date (April 8, 2026). Within 72 hours of the bootcamp start time, tickets become non-refundable but may be transferred to another attendee.

tickets.name: Standard Pass (Live Only)
tickets.description: Single-attendee pass with live access to all main conference sessions on April 15, 2026. Does not include recordings.
benefits: Live access to all keynotes and breakout sessions on the main conference day
Access to virtual expo and sponsor booths during live hours
Networking lounge access during live event
Does not include session recordings (live only)

tickets.name: Standard + Recordings Pass
tickets.description: Single-attendee pass with live access plus 30 days of on-demand session recordings.
benefits: Live access to all keynotes and breakout sessions on the main conference day
Session recordings included (30 days on-demand access)
Downloadable slide decks for selected sessions
Access to virtual expo, sponsor booths, and networking lounge

tickets.name: VIP All-Access Pass
tickets.description: Premium single-attendee pass with extended recordings, VIP roundtables, and exclusive Q&A with speakers.
benefits: Live access to all keynotes and breakout sessions on the main conference day
Session recordings included (12 months on-demand access)
Exclusive VIP small-group Q&A with selected speakers
Priority support and concierge assistance during the event
Bonus VIP-only workshop on advanced experimentation frameworks

tickets.name: Team of 3 Pass
tickets.description: Discounted bundle for up to 3 attendees from the same company, including live access and 30 days of recordings.
benefits: Includes 3 attendee seats for the main conference day
Session recordings included (30 days on-demand access for all team members)
Shared access to slide decks and bonus resources
Ideal for small growth or demand-gen teams

tickets.name: Team of 5 Pass
tickets.description: Best-value bundle for up to 5 attendees, with live access and recordings for the whole team.
benefits: Includes 5 attendee seats for the main conference day
Session recordings included (30 days on-demand access for all team members)
Team-ready recap notes and implementation checklist
Great for cross-functional growth, product, and analytics teams

tickets.name: Company Unlimited Pass
tickets.description: One simple pass covering your entire company, with up to 25 attendees included and extended access to recordings.
benefits: Includes up to 25 attendee seats for the main conference day
Session recordings included (12 months on-demand access for your entire company)
Company-wide license to share slide decks and internal training materials
Ideal for distributed or fast-growing teams that want broad access

sessions.title: Opening Keynote: Building a Measurable Growth Engine
sessions.description: Kick off Growth Marketing Summit Online 2026 with a keynote on how leading B2B and SaaS teams structure their growth engines across email, social, and product-led loops.

sessions.title: From Welcome to Renewal: Email Journeys that Compound Growth
sessions.description: A deep dive into designing email marketing journeys across welcome, onboarding, activation, and renewal, with examples from high-growth B2B SaaS companies.

sessions.title: Social Playbook: Turning LinkedIn and Meta into Pipeline
sessions.description: Learn how performance marketers structure social campaigns, creative, and offers to consistently generate qualified pipeline from LinkedIn and Meta.

sessions.title: Analytics Foundations: From Vanity Metrics to Revenue Insights
sessions.description: Move beyond clicks and opens. This session covers building analytics frameworks that tie email, social, and in-product behavior back to revenue.

sessions.title: Panel: B2B SaaS Growth Stories
sessions.description: Hear how B2B SaaS leaders orchestrate email, social, and product signals to drive efficient growth in 2026.

sessions.title: Designing High-Velocity Growth Experiments
sessions.description: A tactical walkthrough of experimentation programs across email subject lines, landing pages, and pricing pages, with real test examples.

sessions.title: Building a Full-Funnel Growth Dashboard
sessions.description: Learn how to connect ad, email, CRM, and product data into a single growth dashboard your leadership team will actually use.

sessions.title: Live Teardowns: Email, Social Ads, and Landing Pages
sessions.description: Watch experts teardown real attendee email campaigns, social ads, and landing pages, with specific recommendations you can apply the same day.

sessions.title: Closing Fireside Chat: What Were Testing Next
sessions.description: A candid conversation with growth leaders on the experiments, channels, and data questions theyre prioritizing next quarter.

sessions.title: Networking Lounge: Meet Other Growth Marketers
sessions.description: Drop into themed networking rooms to connect with peers working on similar email, social, and analytics challenges.

sessions.title: Pre-Event Onboarding & Platform Walkthrough
sessions.description: Get familiar with the event platform, test your setup, and learn how to build your personal agenda before the main conference day.

sessions.title: Pre-Event Email Copy Clinic
sessions.description: Submit your welcome or reactivation email and get live feedback from our copywriting coaches before the conference.

sessions.title: Social Strategy Roundtable for B2B Teams
sessions.description: Join an intimate roundtable discussion on planning your next quarter of social content and campaigns.

sessions.title: Replay Access Kickoff & Best Sessions Tour
sessions.description: A quick walkthrough of how to access session recordings, plus recommendations for the top email, social, and analytics talks to watch first.

sessions.title: Office Hours: Implementing What You Learned
sessions.description: Bring your questions about implementing new email flows, social experiments, and analytics dashboards after the summit.

sessions.title: Bootcamp Kickoff: Experimentation Mindset
sessions.description: Set the stage for the bootcamp with a quick primer on experimentation velocity, guardrails, and success metrics.

sessions.title: Hands-On Lab: Email and Landing Page Experiments
sessions.description: Work through real examples of email subject line tests and landing page experiments, including how to instrument results in your analytics stack.

sessions.title: Hands-On Lab: Social and Ad Experiments
sessions.description: Design and prioritize experiments for social ads, creatives, and offers, with a focus on fast learning for B2B SaaS funnels.

sessions.title: Bootcamp Wrap-Up & Next 30 Days Plan
sessions.description: Close the bootcamp by turning your experiment backlog into a concrete 30-day testing roadmap, with guidance on analytics instrumentation.

speakers.name: Amelia Bryant
speakers.bio: Amelia Bryant leads growth at FunnelLoop, a B2B SaaS platform used by hundreds of revenue teams. She specializes in stitching together email, product signals, and paid channels into a single measurable growth engine. Before FunnelLoop, she built lifecycle programs at two IPO-bound SaaS companies.

speakers.name: Raj Patel
speakers.bio: Raj Patel runs paid social for PipelineOS, where he manages seven-figure LinkedIn and Meta budgets focused on B2B pipeline generation. His campaigns blend creative testing, tight audience design, and rigorous analytics to drive efficient growth for complex SaaS sales cycles.

speakers.name: Emma Choi
speakers.bio: Emma Choi helps growth teams turn noisy data into clear decisions. At MetricNorth, she leads a team that builds analytics frameworks, dashboards, and experimentation programs for high-growth B2B SaaS companies across North America and Europe.

speakers.name: Luis Garcia
speakers.bio: Luis Garcia is an email strategist who has written and optimized campaigns for more than 150 B2B brands. He focuses on lifecycle programs that drive activation, retention, and expansion, with a strong bias toward experimentation and copy that sounds human.

speakers.name: Sophia Kim
speakers.bio: Sophia Kim hosts GrowthWave’s flagship virtual events and leads a global community of growth marketers. With a background in product marketing and customer education, she is known for making complex topics feel approachable and actionable.

speakers.name: Daniel Hoffman
speakers.bio: Daniel Hoffman leads social content at BrightScale, where he helps B2B brands ship high-impact creative on LinkedIn, X, and TikTok. He combines brand storytelling with performance testing to turn scroll-stopping content into measurable results.

speakers.name: Michael Ross
speakers.bio: Michael Ross works with growth and product teams to design high-velocity experimentation programs. He has helped SaaS companies move from ad-hoc A/B tests to structured, data-informed roadmaps spanning email, landing pages, and in-product flows.

speakers.name: Irene Novak
speakers.bio: As CMO at RevSync, a revenue operations SaaS platform, Irene Novak oversees global marketing across brand, demand, and product-led growth. She brings 15+ years of experience scaling B2B SaaS companies from early traction to international expansion.

speakers.name: Hannah Liu
speakers.bio: Hannah Liu specializes in SEO for complex B2B funnels, helping teams turn organic traffic into qualified pipeline. She is known for pragmatic, experiment-driven SEO programs that play nicely with paid and lifecycle channels.

speakers.name: Oliver Santos
speakers.bio: Oliver Santos works at the intersection of product marketing and growth, helping SaaS teams position their products, craft launch campaigns, and enable revenue teams with the right narratives and assets.
